title: Create: Rags to Riches
description: Manufacture diamonds with the Create mod!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/jdOqDr02ZCo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
Created by jetpacker06, author of Create: Broken Bad and Create: Engineer's Construct.
Automatically manufacture diamonds with the Create mod! Crush tremendous amounts of logs, then treat with heat and pressure! For Forge 1.20.1.

Join the [discord!](https://discord.gg/JzAQPX7kDR) Same server as all of my other mods.

Backports to older MC versions likely.

Started 12/28/2024.
